description: There is no context output for this command.

outputs.description: xdome-get-device-vulnerability-relations
outputs.name: There is no context output for this command.

outputs.description: Base Command
outputs.name: Get details of devices with their related vulnerabilities from the database. The data returned by this endpoint for each device corresponds to the vulnerabilities table in the single device page.

outputs.description: Name designated by Claroty's Research team, based on the advisory name or CVE ID. XDome.DeviceVulnerability.vulnerability_type Type such as "Application", "Clinical", "IoT" or "Platform".
outputs.name: XDome.DeviceVulnerability.vulnerability_name

outputs.description: List Relevant Common Vulnerability Exploits for the selected vulnerability. XDome.DeviceVulnerability.vulnerability_cvss_v3_score
outputs.name: XDome.DeviceVulnerability.vulnerability_cve_ids

outputs.description: Common Vulnerability Scoring System Version 3 score (0-10). In case of multiple CVEs, the highest Subscore is displayed. XDome.DeviceVulnerability.vulnerability_adjusted_vulnerability_score The Adjusted Vulnerability Score represents the vulnerability score based on its impact and exploitability.
outputs.name: Number

outputs.description: The calculated Adjusted vulnerability Score (AVS) level of a vulnerability, such as "Critical", or "High". XDome.DeviceVulnerability.vulnerability_epss_score A probability score between 0 to 1 indicating the likelihoodof a vulnerability to be exploited in the wild, based on the Exploit Prediction Scoring System (EPSS) model.
outputs.name: XDome.DeviceVulnerability.vulnerability_adjusted_vulnerability_score_level

outputs.description: Details about the vulnerability. XDome.DeviceVulnerability.vulnerability_exploits_count An aggregated numeric field of the number of known exploits based on ExploitDB.
outputs.name: XDome.DeviceVulnerability.vulnerability_description

outputs.description: A boolean field indicating whether a vulnerability is currently exploited in-the-wild, based on the CISA Catalog of Known Exploited Vulnerabilities. XDome.DeviceVulnerability.vulnerability_published_date Date
outputs.name: XDome.DeviceVulnerability.vulnerability_is_known_exploited

outputs.description: XDome.DeviceVulnerability.vulnerability_relevance The device vulnerability relevance reflects the confidence level of the detection process, corresponding to several components, such as the vulnerability type. XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_vulnerability_detection_date
outputs.name: The date and time the vulnerability was released.

outputs.description: The date when the vulnerability was initially detected on the device. A vulnerability is considered detected once marked as “confirmed” or “potentially relevant” for the respective device. XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_network_list List
outputs.name: Date

outputs.description: XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_category The device category group (see "About Device Categorization" in the Knowledge Base). XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_subcategory
outputs.name: The network types, "Corporate" and or "Guest", that the device belongs to.

outputs.description: The device sub-category group (see "About Device Categorization" in the Knowledge Base). XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_type The device type group (see "About Device Categorization" in the Knowledge Base).
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: A universal unique identifier (UUID) for the device. XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_asset_id Asset ID.
outputs.name: XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_uid

outputs.description: List MAC address associated with the device. XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_ip_list
outputs.name: XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_mac_list

outputs.description: IP address associated with the device. IPs may be suffixed by a / (annotation), where annotation may be a child device ID or (Last Known IP). XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_type_family The device type family group (see "About Device Categorization" in the Knowledge Base).
outputs.name: List

outputs.description: The device's model. XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_os_category The device's OS category, such as "Windows", "Linux" or "Other".
outputs.name: XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_model

outputs.description: The device's serial number. XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_vlan_list List
outputs.name: XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_serial_number

outputs.description: XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_labels List The labels added to the device manually or automatically.
outputs.name: The virtual LAN to which the device belongs.

outputs.description: List The users and or groups the device is assigned to. XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_hw_version
outputs.name: XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_assignees

outputs.description: The hardware version of the device. XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_local_name Similar to hostname, the device name identifier is extracted from protocol traffic.
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: The aggregated value of OS name, version and revision, such as "Windows XP SP3". XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_endpoint_security_names List
outputs.name: XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_combined_os

outputs.description: XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_equipment_class Determines the equipment class of the device, according to The Joint Commission (TJC). XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_management_services
outputs.name: The names of endpoint security applications installed on the device.

outputs.description: Defines whether the device is managed by Active Directory, Mobile Device Management, or neither. XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_purdue_level The network layer the device belongs to, based on the Purdue Reference Model for Industrial Control System (ICS). The network segmentation-based model defines OT and IT systems into six levels and the logical network boundary controls for securing these networks.
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: The most recent unique hostname identifier of the device, extracted from HTTP protocol traffic. XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_snmp_last_seen_hostname The most recent unique hostname identifier of the device, extracted from SNMP protocol traffic.
outputs.name: XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_http_last_seen_hostname

outputs.description: The notes added to the device. XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_domains List
outputs.name: XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_note

outputs.description: XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_internet_communication The manner of the device's communication over the internet. XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_edr_is_up_to_date_text
outputs.name: The domain name of the network that the device belongs to.

outputs.description: Determines whether the endpoint security application installed on the device is up-to-date. XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_mac_oui_list List
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_ip_assignment_list List The device's IP assignment method, extracted from DHCP protocol traffic, such as "DHCP", "DHCP (Static Lease)", or "Static".
outputs.name: The vendor of the device's NIC, according to the OUI (Organizational Unique Identifier) in the MAC address.

outputs.description: List The name of the VLAN, extracted from switch configurations. XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_vlan_description_list
outputs.name: XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_vlan_name_list

outputs.description: The description of the VLAN, extracted from switch configurations. XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_connection_type_list List
outputs.name: List

outputs.description: XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_ssid_list List The name of the wireless network the device is connected to, such as "Guest".
outputs.name: The connection types of a device, such as "Ethernet".

outputs.description: List The location of the access point the device is connected to, extracted from Network Management integrations. XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_switch_port_list
outputs.name: XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_ap_location_list

outputs.description: The port identifier of the switch the device is connected to. XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_switch_location_list List
outputs.name: List

outputs.description: XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_number_of_nics The number of network interface cards seen on the network. XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_last_seen_list
outputs.name: The location of the switch the device is connected to.

outputs.description: The date and time a device's NIC was last seen. XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_first_seen_list List
outputs.name: List

outputs.description: XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_is_online A boolean field indicating whether the device is online or not. XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_network_scope_list
outputs.name: The date and time a device's NIC was first seen.

outputs.description: The device's Network Scope - used to differentiate between internal networks that share the same IP subnets. XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_name The Device Name attribute is set automatically based on the priority of the Auto-Assigned Device attribute. You can also set it manually. The Device Name can be the device’s IP, hostname, etc.
outputs.name: List

outputs.description: Manufacturer of the device, such as "Alaris". XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_site_name The name of the site within the healthcare organization the device is associated with.
outputs.name: XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_manufacturer

outputs.description: The calculated risk level of a device, such as "Critical", or "High". XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_risk_score_points The calculated risk points of a device, such as "54.1".
outputs.name: XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_risk_score

outputs.description: The calculated effective likelihood subscore level of a device, such as "Critical", or "High". XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_effective_likelihood_subscore_points The calculated effective likelihood subscore points of a device, such as "54.1".
outputs.name: XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_effective_likelihood_subscore

outputs.description: The calculated likelihood subscore level of a device, such as "Critical", or "High". XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_likelihood_subscore_points The calculated likelihood subscore points of a device, such as "54.1".
outputs.name: XDome.DeviceVulnerability.device_likelihood_subscore
